text: URGENT: Dam cracks. City will flood tonight. Evacuate immediately. Govt hiding truth.
Schools closed tomorrow statewide due to cyclone warning.
Earthquake 7.2 hit Mumbai just now. Buildings collapsing.
Water supply contaminated. Do not drink tap water for 48 hours.
Old 2018 Kerala flood video re-shared as happening now in Chennai.
Exam paper leaked for NEET. Download from telegram.
Riots starting in city center. Stay indoors.
IMD issued yellow alert for heavy rain in Thiruvananthapuram district.
Bridge collapse in unrelated state forwarded as local emergency.
Share this message before they delete it. Virus outbreak at local hospital.
Traffic diversion on NH bypass due to maintenance tomorrow 9am-5pm.
Wildfire spreading to residential area evacuate now!!!
Government announced holiday for festival on Monday.
Tsunami warning for entire east coast in 30 minutes.
Power outage scheduled in sector 4 for grid maintenance 2-4pm.
